modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble logging into the USD Storefront site.

full_description_text:  
User is having issues logging into the Storefront. They can't access the site at all. It seems like something's not working right. Just need some help with this login problem.
short_description: Trouble logging into the USD Storefront site.
description: User is having issues logging into the Storefront. They can't access the site at all. It seems like something's not working right. Just need some help with this login problem.
